title: Lesson 61
paragraph: This lesson focuses on practical B1 vocabulary for everyday communication.

words.meaning: a living thing that grows in soil and has leaves or flowers
words.example: This plant needs water every day.

words.meaning: the official group that protects people and stops crime
words.example: The police helped the lost child.

words.meaning: something difficult that needs a solution
a hard path for cars, buses, and bikes
words.example: The road is closed after the storm.

words.meaning: a part of a building with walls, a floor, and a ceiling
words.example: This room is warm and quiet.

words.meaning: a large area of salt water
words.example: The sea was calm in the morning.

words.meaning: one of the four parts of the year
a place where people buy things
one of the left, right, top, or bottom parts of something
words.example: Write your name on the left side of the page.

words.meaning: a board, mark, or action that gives information
words.example: The sign says the road is closed.
